task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigates to and opens the 'Shift Day Nutrition' plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Shift Day Nutrition' plan page is visible in the wger web interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent locates the 'Lunch' meal section within the plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Lunch' meal header or section is visible on the screen within the nutrition plan.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Chicken Breast Raw' is added to the Lunch meal with an amount of approximately 200g.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ingredient 'Chicken Breast Raw' is listed under the Lunch meal with a quantity between 195g and 205g.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Brown Rice Cooked' is added to the Lunch meal with an amount of approximately 150g.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ingredient 'Brown Rice Cooked' is listed under the Lunch meal with a quantity between 145g and 155g.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Broccoli Raw' is added to the Lunch meal with an amount of approximately 100g.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the wger web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the wger application at http://localhost is visible, rather than a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the wger UI elements (buttons, forms, ingredient search dropdowns) being used, rather than a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database manipulation to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing sqlite3, django shell, or direct database commands are visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Plan: 'Shift Day Nutrition'. Target Meal: 'Lunch'. Required Ingredients and Amounts (with a +/- 5g tolerance): 'Chicken Breast Raw' (195g - 205g), 'Brown Rice Cooked' (145g - 155g), 'Broccoli Raw' (95g - 105g).
